WildFingleBush.name: Wild Fingle Bush
WildFingleBush.effectDesc: It tastes like spinich but honeslty not too bad, you gain 1 HP
WildFingleBush.desc: A small plant with large green leaves, the leaves are triangular and connected to a small twig as a base.
WildFingleBush.isBoiled: the water slowly turns a redish hue as you boiled the plant, after fully steeping the liquid is slight red. It doesnt look very strong.

Iris_Versicolor.name: Iris Versicolor
Iris_Versicolor.effectDesc: It tastes very pungent bitter and terrible. Leaves a burning aftertaste, You are now POISONED
Iris_Versicolor.desc: A light purple flower with long thin petals
Iris_Versicolor.isBoiled: causes severe gastrointestinal distress, including vomiting, diarrhea, intense abdominal pain, and nausea

Lions_Mane.name: Lion's Mane
Lions_Mane.effectDesc: It tastes bland with a earthy undertone
Lions_Mane.desc: commonly known as lion's mane, yamabushitake, bearded tooth fungus, or bearded hedgehog, is a species of tooth fungus. It tends to grow in a single clump with dangling spines longer than 1 centimetre
Lions_Mane.isBoiled: The water turns a murky white color

Water_Lily.name: Water Lily
Water_Lily.effectDesc: It tastes mildly sweet with an earth tone similar to beans
Water_Lily.desc: A pink or purple large flower that rests on the waters surface.
Water_Lily.isBoiled: the water turns a yellowish tint, a caffine free tea from dried lily flowers. Has a delicate floral and slightly sweet taste. Calms nerves, reduces anxiety and used a sleep aid

Hornwart.name: Hortwart
Hornwart.desc: has fluffy, filamentous bright green leaves. The stems can recover quickly, growing new leasves within a few weeks.
